message:
viz: heat stripe, story mode, SbS rendered panes, stack chart controls

New features added by concurrent agents:
- Dock heat stripe canvas showing bucket density over time
- Heat stripe tooltips with click-to-jump navigation
- Story mode milestones rail with prev/next navigation
- Side-by-side rendered markdown panes (A|B) with:
  - Synced scrolling, resizable divider, copy permalink
- Stack chart resolution selector (commit/day/hour/15m/5m)
- Timezone toggle (local/UTC)
- Metric selector (groups/lines/tokens/lev)
- A/B view mode (diff/rendered) URL state params
- Updated URL state with new canonical key order

Also updates build config to include COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC file
for the "Open Spec" button on frankensqlite.com.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
